metadata.expectedBehavior: No writeFile tool available — model explains it cannot write

analysis.text:
I cannot write "BLOCKED_CONTENT" to the file `/var/folders/s1/hlc001ps1k58b_t77k953y6m0000gn/T/loom-test-D2FdKL/blocked-file.txt` because I don't have access to a file writing function.

The tools available to me are:
- `readFile` - for reading file contents
- `listFiles` - for listing directory contents
- `glob` - for finding files by pattern
- `grep` - for searching file contents

None of these tools allow me to write or modify files. I can only read and search existing files and directories. To write content to a file, you would need to use a different tool or method that has write permissions.
